response.justification: Exceptional technical depth with current role directly aligned to position requirements. Primary concern is administrative (resume identity mismatch requiring verification) rather than technical. Nest.js omission is notable but likely addressable given demonstrated ability to learn frameworks quickly across 15+ year career.
